monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,300 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S4 · Humanitarian · Beirut, Lebanon · 19h ago. Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 rises to 4,303, according to official reports.
Houthi Attack Kills 14 Government Troops in Yemen
— S3 · Conflict · Yemen · 12m ago. An attack by Yemen's Houthi rebels resulted in the deaths of 14 government troops, indicating continued kinetic conflict in the region.
Israel Kills Two Hamas Fighters in Gaza During Ceasefire
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 1h ago. Israeli military confirms it killed two Hamas fighters in Gaza, violating the ceasefire agreement.
